subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-08-15 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: I walked to the seashore; this place is most delightful, for it resembles Darband in Shimiran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تا لب دریا رفتم خیلی اینجا خوش وضعیست چون مثل دربند شمیران میماند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @development of capacity and readiness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
